title: Manufacturing Engineer - Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd!
